name: Impossible Lasagne Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground beef, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a pie plate (10" x 1-1/2") or a square baking dish (8" x 8").
3. In the prepared pie plate, layer cottage cheese and grated Parmesan cheese.
4. In a bowl, mix cooked ground beef with 1 cup of mozzarella, oregano, basil, and tomato paste.
5. In a blender, beat together milk, eggs, Bisquick, salt, pepper, and remaining ingredients until smooth.
6. Pour the mixture evenly over the beef mixture in the pie plate.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Sprinkle with the remaining cheese and return to the oven for an additional 1-2 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
9. Let cool for 5 minutes before sprinkling with chopped parsley.
Note: For half the recipe, use 1 quart square or round casserole dish. Divide ingredient amounts in half and decrease blending time to 10 seconds in the blender or 30 seconds with a wire whisk or hand beater. The first baking time can also be reduced to 25-30 minutes. High altitude: No adjustments necessary.
